Her journey began with an initial count of 25 dogs, but the week brought significant changes to the population. These additions increased her total count before the weekend adoptions took place.

***

The situation shifted on Saturday when two families decided to adopt, taking a total of 6 dogs to their new homes at [adoption center name]. After these departures, Emily is left with a specific number of dogs that she must now care for, which is calculated as [final count]. She is now preparing the kennels for the next potential arrival from [shelter name] and updating her records in the [software name] system to ensure every dog is accounted for properly.
